title: Planned Power Outage for Newton Electric Customers
summary: Newton electric customers will experience a power outage Tuesday night due to Duke Energy maintenance between U.S. 321 Business and N.C. Highway 16.
charlotte_impact: Planned outages can disrupt daily life; residents should prepare accordingly to minimize inconvenience and ensure safety.

title: Scattered Showers Forecast for Memorial Day
summary: The Memorial Day forecast includes scattered showers and storms, making it less than ideal for outdoor activities.
charlotte_impact: Weather conditions may affect Memorial Day plans, requiring adjustments for outdoor events and travel.

title: South Carolina Considers New Congressional Maps Mid-Election
summary: South Carolina may approve new congressional maps, potentially leading to a separate primary for U.S. House seats on Aug. 18.
charlotte_impact: Mid-election map changes can significantly impact election outcomes and voter representation.

title: Memorial Day Ceremony to Honor Fallen Service Members
summary: A Memorial Day ceremony will be held at Gethsemane Cemetery and Memorial Gardens at 10 a.m. to honor fallen service members.
charlotte_impact: Memorial Day ceremonies provide an opportunity to remember and honor those who died serving the nation.

title: Teen Driver Hits Two Officers at Checkpoint; Charges Pending
summary: Two Conover officers are recovering after being struck by a car at a license checkpoint on County Home Road NW; charges are pending.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers faced by law enforcement officers and the importance of safe driving practices.

title: Rock Hill Man Indicted for Threatening to Kill Trump
summary: A South Carolina man was indicted on federal charges for allegedly making online threats to kill President Trump.
charlotte_impact: Threats against public officials are taken seriously and can result in federal charges and prosecution.

title: Man Charged with Murder After Deadly Shooting in Richmond County
summary: A 64-year-old man faces murder and firearm possession charges after allegedly shooting Lacy Kyser Jackson in Richmond County.
charlotte_impact: Violent crime impacts community safety and underscores the need for effective law enforcement and prevention strategies.

title: Charlotte Airport and American Airlines Extend Lease Negotiations
summary: Charlotte Douglas Airport (CLT) and American Airlines (AA) have extended lease negotiations for up to 1 year to reach a mutually beneficial agreement.
charlotte_impact: Ensures continued airport operations and services while long-term agreements are negotiated.

title: Former School Employee Charged with Fraud for Fake Mileage Claims
summary: Kathryn Lynn Earp, a former Union County school employee, is charged with fraud for allegedly submitting fraudulent mileage claims.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the importance of accountability and ethical conduct in public service and financial management.

title: NoDa Homicide Suspect Arrested in Alabama
summary: The suspect in a NoDa homicide case has been arrested in Alabama and will be extradited to Mecklenburg County to face a murder charge.
charlotte_impact: Arrest brings progress in a serious case, offering some closure to the community and the victim's family.

title: Daniel Suárez Wins Rain-Shortened Coca-Cola 600
summary: Daniel Suárez wins the rain-shortened Coca-Cola 600 after a late pit stop gamble, saluting Kyle Busch after the victory.
charlotte_impact: Showcases the excitement and strategy involved in NASCAR racing and celebrates a significant sporting achievement.

title: 16-Year-Old Found Safe
summary: Police report that a missing 16-year-old has been found safe.
charlotte_impact: Positive outcome in a missing person case, bringing relief to family and community.

title: Deadly Crash Investigation in Concord
summary: A deadly crash in Concord forced the closure of Poplar Tent Road for more than an hour on Sunday; investigation ongoing.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers of road travel and the serious consequences of traffic accidents.

title: Crowd Rush at SC Event Injures 19
summary: A crowd rush at the Atlantic Beach festival in SC injured 19 people; officials believe it started when one person ran.
charlotte_impact: Crowd control and safety measures are crucial at large events to prevent injuries and ensure public safety.

title: Driver Killed in Crash Near Kershaw
summary: A driver was killed in a crash on U.S. Highway 601 near Kershaw on Saturday night, according to state troopers.
charlotte_impact: Reinforces the importance of safe driving practices and the potential for fatal consequences on roadways.
